name: Collar (Protective Collar)
description: Hold underlying, buy OTM put for downside protection, sell OTM call to finance the put. Limits both upside and downside.

legs.description: Long 1 OTM put ~15 delta for downside protection
Short 1 OTM call ~20 delta to finance the put

entry_rules: Hold or buy 100 shares of underlying
Buy protective put at target delta
Sell call at target delta to offset put cost
Aim for zero-cost or small net debit
exit_rules: If put goes deep ITM, consider exercising for capital preservation
Accept call assignment if stock moves above call strike
roll_rules: Roll both options together to maintain collar structure
Adjust strikes based on new price level after roll
objective: Protect against downside while maintaining equity exposure with capped upside

risk_profile.max_profit: Call strike - stock price - net debit
risk_profile.max_loss: Stock price - put strike + net debit
risk_profile.breakeven: Stock price + net debit (or - net credit)

best_environment: Uncertain market, elevated vol (cheaper collar via higher call premium), position protection needed
